name: Filesystem Requirements Documentation

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Filesystem Requirements Documentation is complete and correct

scope: flock(2) advisory locking is not honored on NFS or network filesystems. Document in README and SECURITY.md that .wolfcastle/ must reside on a local filesystem. Note the specific risk: concurrent access from network-mounted directories can corrupt state silently.
success_criteria: README.md contains a section documenting that .wolfcastle/ must reside on a local filesystem, with the flock(2)/NFS rationale and silent corruption risk
SECURITY.md contains a filesystem requirements section explaining the locking limitation and deployment constraint

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 leaf child: documentation-updates (2 tasks). Task ordering: README first, then SECURITY.md. Both are independent but logically grouped since they document the same flock(2)/NFS limitation. No specs needed; this is pure documentation against well-understood syscall behavior.
